prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 smartphone selfie that looks like a real casual high-quality photo taken with a modern phone, suitable for a social media profile or story. The subject is a friendly young Japanese woman centered close to the camera, photographed from slightly above chest level with her arms subtly visible at the bottom as if holding the phone. She has dark brown hair tied back neatly with wispy bangs and a few loose flyaway strands, smooth natural skin, large brown eyes, soft pink lips, minimal fresh makeup, and a gentle approachable smile while looking directly into the lens. She wears a crisp white long-sleeve collared shirt under a dark navy office vest with one visible button and a pocket, plus a large tied neck scarf in teal, navy, green, and white diagonal stripes. The background is an indoor reception or service counter area with an off-white wall, partial large Japanese wall text visible on the right reading 受付, and a thin turquoise horizontal line beneath it. Use bright even indoor lighting, natural phone-camera sharpness, slight wide-angle lens distortion, realistic skin texture, subtle JPEG compression, no studio lighting, no glamour advertising look, no heavy retouching, no extra people, no watermark.
